message:
Remove old PyObject codegen and update architecture to native-only

Removed old PyObject codegen files:
- src/codegen.zig (671 lines) - Replaced by native.zig
- src/codegen/builtins.zig (27K) - No longer needed
- src/codegen/classes/ (5 files) - Including c_ffi.zig
- src/codegen/control_flow.zig
- src/codegen/expressions.zig
- src/codegen/functions.zig
- src/codegen/operators.zig
- src/codegen/statements.zig
- Deleted .bak files (classes.zig.bak, native.zig.bak, etc.)
- Removed codegen import from src/main.zig

Updated .claude/pyaot.md for native-only approach:
- FFI bridge → Native Zig stdlib + C library integration
- Python interop → Direct C ABI via @cImport
- Month 7-9 deliverables updated to reflect native approach
- Architecture diagrams updated for pure Zig codegen

Current architecture:
Python → Type Inference → Native Zig Codegen → Native Binary
(No PyObject overhead, no Python runtime dependency)
